entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's personal knowledge and runtime system that stores logs and manages workflows

entities.name: conversation-end workflow
entities.context: Multi-phase workflow that handles workspace cleanup and knowledge extraction when conversations close

entities.name: workspace root cleanup
entities.context: Phase 2 of conversation-end that deletes artifacts, removes duplicates, and flags files for review

entities.name: cleanup_log
entities.context: JSON log file saved to N5/runtime/ recording cleanup actions with timestamps and statistics

entities.name: knowledge base
entities.context: System updated in Phase 3 of conversation-end for storing extracted insights

entities.name: Dry Run by Default
entities.context: Safety principle ensuring all cleanup operations preview changes before execution

relationships.context: Workspace root cleanup is Phase 2 of the conversation-end workflow
Phase 3 updates the knowledge base with extracted insights
Dry run is a safety feature that previews changes before execution
Cleanup logs are stored in the N5/runtime/ directory
